title: give me the test code for esp 32

messages.text: give me the test code for esp 32
It seems like you might want to add something specific to the code, possibly related to the PLED (Programmable LED) functionality. Could you clarify what you'd like to achieve with the PLED?

It sounds like you're looking to integrate an OLED display into your project. Could you provide more details about how you plan to use the OLED? For example, are you looking to display text, graphics, or data?
I'm not sure I understand what you mean by "it should yuvan." Could you clarify that for me? Are you referring to a specific functionality or design aspect related to the OLED display?

It sounds like you're referring to displaying something related to "Yuvan" on an OLED screen. Could you provide a bit more detail about what you're trying to achieve? Are you looking to display specific text, graphics, or perhaps some data?
